title: Proof Boundary — GitHub as Knowledge-System Control Plane
supported_claims: The repository stores governance, state, schemas, templates, canonical records, generated views, and synchronization artifacts.
Local execution can continue when a preferred workspace or hosted CI surface is unavailable.
GitHub currently provides versioned persistence and audit history for the Nelson Knowledge System.
unsupported_claims: GitHub is the permanent production architecture.
Google Drive is fully synchronized in every session.
The system has measured public or commercial outcomes.
